source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A rug is made with three different colors as shown. The areas of the three differently colored regions form an arithmetic progression. The inner rectangle is one foot wide, and each of the two shaded regions is $1$ foot wide on all four sides. What is the length in feet of the inner rectangle?
<image1>
extraction_notes: question text contains image placeholder <image1>; using raw_record.image as the image path

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'as shown in the image'
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the visual layout is necessary
the problem refers to three colored regions and shaded bands, which depend on the pictured geometry
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and image_manifest shows a valid image asset exists
multi_step: solving requires relating areas of three nested rectangular regions to an arithmetic progression
the widths of the inner rectangle and both surrounding 1-foot bands must be combined into a geometric setup
the task likely needs equation formation and solving for an unknown length, not direct lookup
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single value ('2')
the geometry description appears well constrained, so a derived equation can be checked mechanically
asset_registry_record.answer_manifest.answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support clean downstream validation
the final answer format is unambiguous compared with open-ended textual responses

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、图像、答案均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
题目核心语义有支撑，图像资源有效，数值答案明确且可验证
虽有 visual_layout_not_directly_inspected 风险标记，但不构成核心语义缺失，适合进入候选池
